summary: Four new ant educational content components were added and EducationalContent.tsx was updated to import them and extend the selectedPest union. However, the diff summary does not show the required new static ant icon assets under frontend/public/assets/generated, nor does it clearly evidence that the ant icons are used in the selection UI and that all tabs render the correct ant content via the existing renderPestContent switch pattern. The diff summary also indicates several unrelated UI/content changes outside the ant scope.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add static icon image assets for Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants, and Carpenter Ants under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact specified filenames, and use them in the pest selection controls via tags with appropriate alt text.
missing_requirements.reason: No new files under frontend/public/assets/generated are shown as added/modified, and the visible EducationalContent.tsx snippet only shows usage for existing pests (e.g., cockroaches/head lice/spiders) but not for the new ant pests.
evidence: frontend/src/components/EducationalContent.tsx (truncated; shows for cockroaches/head lice/spiders but no ant icon usage in the visible portion)
File diff summary: ADDED FILES list does not include any frontend/public/assets/generated/*.png

missing_requirements.requirement: Integrate Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants, and Carpenter Ants into the pest selection UI across Identify, Habitats, Prevention, and Treatment tabs using the existing pattern (selection buttons + conditional rendering via renderPestContent).
missing_requirements.reason: While imports and the selectedPest union were updated, the diff summary snippet is truncated before showing the ant selection buttons and does not show the renderPestContent switch/conditional rendering updates across tabs.
evidence: frontend/src/components/EducationalContent.tsx (truncated; shows imports and selectedPest union update, but not the ant buttons nor the renderPestContent switch/conditional rendering)

hallucinated_features.description: Header rebranding to broader "Pest ID & Guide" branding.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-46/47/48; scope is adding ant pest types content + icons and integrating into existing EducationalContent pattern.

hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goal: do not change existing Bed Bugs quiz/guide section types or content retrieval behavior; also not required for adding ant pests.

hallucinated_features.description: Treatment section changes adding/adjusting an interactive, locally-persisted room preparation checklist with safety confirmation and a new 'During Treatment' item.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in the ant content + icon integration requirements.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (TreatmentSection summary describes checklist gating and new checklist item)

hallucinated_features.description: Global theme/CSS palette updates (OKLCH color palette and checklist utility styling).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by this build; requirements focus on ant content components, selection UI integration, and static icons.

hallucinated_features.description: React Query hooks adjustments and Quiz/PrintableGuides changes to use QuizSectionType/ContentType correctly.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not part of the ant educational content + icons request and risks unintended behavior changes.

hallucinated_features.description: PhotoScanner expansion (image editing tools, local gallery, collapsible Spider Photo Help panel, spider tagging).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in this build; also BuildRequest non-goals include not adding AI/ML identification (even though this is not explicitly AI, it is unrelated scope).
